name: Inghams Group Limited
analysis: ING's 9-SMA is above the 26 and price has reclaimed them. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Price has broken above the base high at A$2.1200. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$2.1400, stop A$1.9404, target A$2.4198 (1.40:1) — then trail it.
